message:
refactor(reactor): restructure io_uring reactor state management and poll user_data allocation

Consolidate io_uring reactor registration tracking into a unified
ReactorState struct and introduce explicit poll user_data allocation
to prevent collisions with sentinel values.

- Extract registrations and poll_ops into ReactorState struct with
  centralized next_poll_user_data counter
- Add allocate_poll_user_data() with collision-safe allocation that
  skips reserved WAKE_USER_DATA and REMOVE_USER_DATA sentinels
- Track active_poll_user_data per registration for reliable cancellation
- Update poll documentation to clarify one-shot semantics matching
  epoll and kqueue backends: higher layers must re-arm after WouldBlock
- Refactor register/deregister/poll paths to use ReactorState methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
